elements.description: Top white label with text '62- HQ-83894', 'Serials EBF 220', a barcode with numbers '62-HQ-83894-EBF 220', and a red plus sign. Black stamp below label reading 'DO NOT DESTROY' and 'FOIPA# 1254932'. Handwritten text 'ENCL. BEHIND FILE'. Handwritten red numbers '62-83894-220'. Bottom white label with text 'FBI - CENTRAL RECORDS CENTER', 'HQ - HEADQUARTERS', table entries 'Class / Case # 0082 83894', 'Sub 1', 'Vol. 220', 'Serial # ONLY', date '8/11/1274164', and a barcode with text 'RRP003IXG6'. Blue label in bottom right corner with text 'Declassification authority derived from FBI Automatic Declassification Guide, issued May 24, 2007.'

judge.reason: Description A only mentions a vertical barcode and text below it, while Description B describes a complex set of multiple labels, stamps, and handwritten text with specific quoted strings, indicating the descriptions are about fundamentally different visual content.
